WBA.rationale: Despite a low P/E of 6.3x, the fundamental trajectory is deteriorating sharply — Q3 revenue declined sequentially, EPS collapsed from $4.13 to $0.33, and operating income turned negative (-$320M), signaling structural pressure on margins that outweighs the optically cheap valuation.
key_factors: EPS collapsed from $4.13 (Nov-21) to $1.02 (Feb-22) to $0.33 (May-22) — a 92% decline in two quarters
Operating income turned negative at -$320M in Q3 vs. positive prior quarters
Revenue declined sequentially: $33.90B → $33.76B → $32.60B
Stock down 15.3% over 3 months despite P/E of only 6.3x — market is pricing in further deterioration
Net margin compressed to 3.9% with operating margin at just 2.2%

sources_cited.excerpt: Walgreens Boots (WBA) Q3 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Miss

AAPL.rationale: AAPL's PE has compressed to 22.0x — near the bottom of its 1-year range (20.9–33.1) — while fundamentals remain elite (26.4% net margin, 151% ROE), making the risk-adjusted reward mildly attractive despite a tough macro backdrop.
key_factors: PE diluted 22.0x vs 1y range 20.9–33.1x — near multi-quarter low
Price down 21.7% over 3 months to $136.72, creating a better entry
Q2 FY22 revenue $97.28B / EPS $1.52 with 26.4% net margin and 30.9% operating margin
ROE 151.2% reflects strong profitability and continued buybacks
News sentiment mixed but selectively bullish ("3 Reasons Why Apple Stock Is a Buy", "Too Cheap to Ignore") against a bearish tape

sources_cited.excerpt: 3 Reasons Why Apple Stock Is a Buy
This FAANG Stock Is Too Cheap to Ignore

trace.final_explanation: LLM-only baseline: 28/30 views on 2022-07-01 via minimax/minimax-m3.
